findings.note: Beat map: open / 4 specimens (escalation) / 5th specimen (warm pivot reveal) / landing. Escalates cleanly: domestic -> civic -> confined -> private -> intimate.
159 words / 60s = 159 WPM. Brisk for Attenborough cadence (~140 WPM target). Will run at ElevenLabs speed 0.92x to land closer to 145 effective WPM.

Title card discipline: 1 supertitle (open) + 5 lower thirds (one per specimen) + 1 supertitle (close). Identical lower-third format across all 5 specimens — reinforces the bureaucratic-archive conceit.

Reveal moment: 'We continue to watch' (Specimen 0317). Marked in metadata.tonal_anchors. Direction is to NOT signal the warmth — let the audience find it. This is the line that distinguishes C3 from snarkier prior art.
